import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut squares: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  mut in_num = false
  mut sign = 1
  mut acc = 0
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    let is_digit = b >= 48 and b <= 57
    let is_minus = b == 45
    let is_plus = b == 43
    if in_num
      if is_digit
        acc = acc * 10 + (b - 48)
      else
        let v = sign * acc
        squares = __list_int_push(squares, v * v)
        in_num = false
        sign = 1
        acc = 0
      end
    else
      if is_digit
        in_num = true
        acc = b - 48
      else if is_minus
        in_num = true
        sign = -1
        acc = 0
      else if is_plus
        in_num = true
        sign = 1
        acc = 0
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if in_num
    let v = sign * acc
    squares = __list_int_push(squares, v * v)
  end
  mut out = ""
  mut j = 0
  let m = squares.len()
  while j < m
    let sq = match squares.get(j)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if j == 0
      out = "#{sq}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{sq}"
    end
    j = j + 1
  end
  println(out)
end
